hero.title: Machine Precision
hero.subtitle: and Financial Engineering
hero.description: Accounting has long ceased to be just moving papers and entering invoices. Today it is a complex engineering system, on the correct architecture of which the survival of a business, its ability to attract investment and pass tax audits depend.

items.label: years in the market
items.description: More than a decade of continuous practice in the constantly changing legislation of the Republic of Kazakhstan.

items.label: clients serviced
items.description: Small and medium businesses in IT, construction, logistics, manufacturing, and e-commerce.

items.label: saved for clients
items.description: Through legal tax optimization, VAT refunds, audit of overpayments, and prevention of fines.

items.label: financial guarantee
items.description: Our liability is secured by an SLA agreement. We reimburse penalties and fines arising from our fault.

ideology.title: Business should earn, not service taxes
ideology.p1: Companies often come to us whose accounting was in a state of permanent chaos: lost electronic invoices, blocked accounts due to unpaid 100 tenge penalties, duplicates in nomenclature causing incorrect cost calculations, and huge overpayments of corporate income tax.
ideology.p2: The problem with in-house accounting often lies in the lack of a dual control system and technological stack. One person cannot equally well know foreign economic activity, complex production accruals, the intricacies of currency control, and IT integration.
ideology.p3: Our solution is the division of labor. Primary documents are processed by operators (fast and accurate). Salary is calculated by a separate payroll specialist (no errors in vacation pay). Taxes are planned by a methodologist. And the process is managed by a financial architect. You get an entire department for the price of one in-house specialist.
ideology.p4: We treat financial data as a critical asset (Master Data Management). We implement strict policies for entering directories and nomenclature, eliminating 'garbage' in databases. All processes are documented, roles are distributed. Replacing an employee within our team goes completely unnoticed by the client.

items.title: Audit and reverse engineering
items.text: We don't just 'pick up' the database. We conduct a deep technical audit: check data integrity in 1C, identify gaps in document chains, analyze tax and accounting registers. We find hidden tax risks, stuck balances, and incorrect postings.

items.title: Data normalization
items.text: Like code refactoring, we rebuild the financial architecture. We restore lost documents, reconcile balances, correct duplicate contractors. We create a clean reference database where every tenge is confirmed.

items.title: Contour automation
items.text: We integrate 1C with client-banks, CRM systems, e-invoicing systems, and virtual warehouses. We set up automatic bank statement downloads, data parsing, and document routing. This eliminates manual entry (human factor) and radically reduces processing time.

items.title: Continuous monitoring (SLA)
items.text: Work moves to the stage of routine maintenance. A specialized team is assigned to you. You receive transparent reporting showing the current tax burden, tax return submission status, and payment plan. Every action we take is strictly subject to internal regulations.

guarantees.title: Legally Binding Guarantees
guarantees.p1: The words 'we are professionals' mean nothing without financial responsibility. Our confidence in our processes allows us to assume 100% of material risks.

items.title: Financial security:
items.text: Full compensation for fines and penalties if they arise due to our mistake.

items.title: Confidentiality (NDA):
items.text: Strict trade secret regime. Encrypted communication channels and secure servers.

items.title: Business continuity:
items.text: No sick leaves, vacations, or sudden resignations. The service operates continuously.

items.title: Price transparency:
items.text: You pay for the volume of operations and contour complexity. No hidden fees.
